description: Op-shaped job that walks the live Dagster asset graph and emits one OpenLineage RunEvent per asset to a collector (Marquez, OpenLineage Proxy, Datakin).

tags.label: Job Tags
tags.description: Dagster job tags as key-value pairs.

endpoint_env_var.label: Endpoint Env Var
endpoint_env_var.description: Env var with the OpenLineage collector base URL (e.g. http://marquez:5000). The job appends /api/v1/lineage if no path is set.

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var with a bearer token if the collector requires auth.

namespace.label: Namespace
namespace.description: OpenLineage namespace. All datasets and jobs from this code location group under this string.

producer.label: Producer URI
producer.description: OpenLineage producer URI identifying the emitter.

only_export_on_change.label: Only Export on Change
only_export_on_change.description: Hash the structural payload and skip emit when unchanged from the previous successful run.

fail_on_collector_error.label: Fail on Collector Error
fail_on_collector_error.description: If true, fail the run when the collector is unreachable. Default false (best-effort emit).
